{"query":"Repossi Place Vendome heritage anniversary celebration July 15 2026 LVMH details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1257,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.marketscreener.com/news/lvmh-repossi-celebrates-its-historic-home-on-place-vendome-ce7f5ed2db8ffe27","title":"LVMH : Repossi celebrates its historic home on Place Vendôme | MarketScreener","content":"For four decades, Place Vendôme has been at the heart of Repossi's story.
To celebrate the 40th anniversary of its boutique at number 6, the Maison pays tribute to the address that has shaped its creative vision, where architecture, design and exceptional craftsmanship have come together since 1986.
LVMH - Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE published this content on **July 15, 2026**, and is solely responsible for the information contained herein.
Distributed via Public Technologies (PUBT), unedited and unaltered, on **July 15, 2026** at **15:15 UTC**.

This super composite rating is the result of a weighted average of the rankings based on the following ratings: Fundamentals (Composite), Valuation (Composite), EPS Revisions (1 year), and Visibility (Composite).","date":"2 days ago"},{"url":"https://luxus-plus.com/en/for-its-2026-journees-particulieres-lvmh-will-be-celebrating-the-heritage-of-its-houses/","title":"For its 2026 Journées Particulières, LVMH will be celebrating the heritage of its Houses - Luxus Plus","content":"For its 2026 Journées Particulières, LVMH will be celebrating the heritage of its Houses
To mark the Special Days organised by LVMH on 16, 17 and 18 October 2026, the group has just unveiled the full programme for its sixth edition, which will be themed ‘At the Roots of the Dream’.
Since 2011, the Journées Particulières has been an event organised by the LVMH Group.
For three days, the Group opens the doors to the behind-the-scenes areas of its Houses and to venues normally closed to the public, such as workshops, manufacturing facilities and historic headquarters.
On the programme for this sixth edition, 65 venues across 11 countries will open their doors exceptionally: from Louis Vuitton’s historic workshops in Asnières and the Château de La Colle Noire in Montauroux to the watchmaking workshops of TAG Heuer, Hublot and Zenith, LVMH will offer the general public exclusive access behind the scenes of the creative process."},{"url":"https://ww.fashionnetwork.com/news/Lvmh-announces-the-return-of-its-journees-particulieres-event,1826378.html","title":"LVMH announces the return of its Journées Particulières event - FashionNetwork","content":"With its Journées Particulières, LVMH aims to attract a large audience, as in the 2022 edition, which drew 200,000 visitors, and to showcase the group's many maisons.
His son Antoine Arnault, the group's image and environment director and the initiator of the project, adds: "With 'Aux Racines du Rêve', we affirm that our know-how is rooted in places, cultures, and practices that shape the exceptional quality of our products.
Further details of the programme will be announced at a later date.
This downturn has been exacerbated by the war in Iran, triggered by the United States at the end of February 2026."}]}

The anniversary coincides with 10 years of the flagship's redesign by Rem Koolhaas and OMA a boutique conceived as a jewel at architectural scale. The Maison also reinvents its three jewellery pillars in exclusive Vendôme editions, each echoing the shifting blue of the Vendôme column: Antifer Heart earrings in blue-hued gold, a Berbère Chromatic ring in blue lacquer, a Serti sur Vide brooch crowned with a floating pear-shaped diamond, and a High Jewellery capsule where tourmalines and aquamarines unfold in gradient compositions.
